findings.description: The CODE_PATTERN table and CODE_NAME table (sample data used to contextualize the code examples) are not included. Without these tables, an AI agent cannot explain why the codeSelect output shows only values 03 and 04 (because only those rows have PATTERN2=1 in CODE_PATTERN), nor what the label text like '0002-03-ja' in the HTML output derives from (the OPTION01 column in CODE_NAME). These tables illustrate how the `pattern` and `optionColumnName` attributes actually filter and populate output at runtime.
findings.source_evidence: Source contains 'CODE_PATTERN テーブルのデータ例' (7 rows with ID/VALUE/PATTERN1/PATTERN2/PATTERN3 columns) and 'CODE_NAME テーブルのデータ例' (14 rows with ID/VALUE/SORT_ORDER/LANG/NAME/SHORT_NAME/OPTION01 columns), placed between the attribute table and the code examples.
